title: Studio Sample Action
heading: Studio sample action
subtitle: A small action card created by the Studio.
introParagraphs: The party can spend a little capacity to test whether this authoring path produces a usable card.

options.label: Spend resources on outreach
options.subtitle: Use resources to increase media reach.
narrativeParagraphs: A small media team packages the issue into posts, clips, and short explanations.

options.label: Save capacity
options.subtitle: Do not spend resources this month.
narrativeParagraphs: The organization keeps its limited capacity available for another fight.
